title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 10: Divine Glories
description: Chapter 10 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals himself as the source of all: among the Adityas, I am Vishnu; among lights, I am the radiant sun.
introduction: Chapter 10 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals himself as the source of all: among the Adityas, I am Vishnu; among lights, I am the radiant sun.

translation.text: I am the Self seated in the hearts of all creatures. I am the beginning, the middle, and the end of all beings.
